# netbox_vpn_tunnel_terminations (Data Source)

From the [official documentation](https://docs.netbox.dev/en/stable/features/vpn-tunnels/):

> NetBox can model private tunnels formed among virtual termination points across your network. Typical tunnel implementations include GRE, IP-in-IP, and IPSec. A tunnel may be terminated to two or more device or virtual machine interfaces. For convenient organization, tunnels may be assigned to user-defined groups.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Defaults to `0`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `terminations` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--terminations))

<a id="nestedatt--terminations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `terminations`

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number)
- `role` (String)
- `tags` (Set of String)
- `termination_id` (Number)
- `termination_type` (String)
- `tunnel_id` (Number)
